sections.paragraph:
verb לסמוך

to trust; rely on; lean; lay; authorize, confirm; support; bring near; approach, draw near

verb לסמך

to support

verb נסמך

to rely upon, to trust in; lean, be supported; be authorized, empowered; ordained; be brought near, be close; in construct state; thicken, become dense

verb להסתמך

to rely, base oneself on, refer

verb להסמיך

to empower, authorize, ordain; thicken, condense; make cent

verb הוסמך

be empowered, authorized, ordained; be condensed; made cent

masculine noun

support; evidence; authority

feminine noun

samekh (the 15th letter in Heb.alphabet)
